creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #12)
> The patch works for me.  iichid_gpio appears to work as well.  

Thanks!

> One unrelated problem is that I can't seem to trigger a right button down event.
>  Clicking anywhere on the touchpad results in a left click, as does a two finger click.

Please, add `hw.iichid.debug=1` to /boot/loader.conf and share iichid`s probe/attach output.
